evals.prompt: You are the code-review-agent. For ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load), review the change set against the spec and standards and produce a verdict. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-101.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: code-review-agent correctly review the change set against the spec and standards and produce a verdict for PROJ-101, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Reviews each change against the approved spec specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md
Checks standards-hook compliance and flags any scope creep
Produces a clear verdict (e.g. APPROVED / changes requested)
